title: astragalus biserrula
intro: Astragalus biserrula, also known as the biserrate milkvetch, is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family. It is a perennial herb native to Central Asia, known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus biserrula include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Astragalus biserrula can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried roots, capsules, or tea, to harness its medicinal properties.
